How to upload a TikTok product screenshot
1
Screenshot up to 3 screens -- product title, description, and reviews give the best results
2
Save each screenshot to your camera roll
3
Tap Upload and select up to 3 images from your camera roll
4
The tool reads all of them together and builds a richer product summary automatically
✨
Your Script Bank
Describe your product and generate a complete script bank. Built on buyer intent -- every line designed to convert.
Content Planner
Plan your week from your TikTok Shop exports

Build this week's plan

Drop in your two weekly exports and Saxe ranks every product by commission per unit, then lays out what to film.

Where to get them
  1. Go to shop.tiktok.com/streamer/home and sign in.
  2. Product file: Analytics, then Product Analytics, then Export.
  3. Video file: Analytics, then Video Analytics, keep Last 7 days, then Export.
Videos per day
Max per product / week
Your files are read right here in your browser. Nothing is uploaded or stored.
